matchingDescription: UK Stocks and Shares ISA — commission-free stock trading, fractional shares, no account fees, FSCS protected. Suitable for UK investors building a long-term equity portfolio.

variants.text: The FCA estimates UK retail investors paid over £1.2bn in trading commissions in 2022. Trading 212 charges zero commission on stocks and ETFs, with no account fees, potentially saving active investors hundreds of pounds annually.

HMRC data shows fewer than 30% of UK adults fully utilise their £20,000 annual ISA allowance. A Stocks and Shares ISA held for 20 years with average 7% annual returns on £10,000 would grow to approximately £38,700 tax-free.

Over 60% of S&P 500 stocks trade above £100 per share, historically limiting retail access. Trading 212 offers fractional shares from £1, enabling full portfolio diversification regardless of share price.

The Investment Association reports average UK fund charges of 0.75% annually. Trading 212's Stocks and Shares ISA holds ETFs with ongoing charges as low as 0.07%, a difference worth £680 annually on a £100,000 portfolio.

Trading 212 is FSCS protected up to £85,000 per eligible claimant. The Financial Services Compensation Scheme has paid out over £1bn to investors since 2001, covering losses if an authorised firm fails.
